description: Apache Maven Core is the central Maven 2.x runtime module that coordinates project building, lifecycle execution, plugin management, and command-line request handling. It connects Maven models, artifacts, repositories, profiles, settings, and reporting components so Maven can resolve dependencies and execute builds.

Apache Maven Core is the central Maven 2.x runtime module that coordinates project building, lifecycle execution, plugin management, and command-line request handling. It connects Maven models, artifacts, repositories, profiles, settings, and reporting components so Maven can resolve dependencies and execute builds.
